title: Register Your Team
description: Form a team of 2-5 members and sign up for one of the competition tracks. Make sure to complete your profile before the registration deadline.

title: Build & Innovate
description: Attend the kickoff ceremony and start building! You will have access to exclusive workshops, APIs from our partners, and dedicated technical mentors.

title: Submit & Pitch
description: Submit your project repository and a short video demo. Top teams will be selected to pitch live on the national stage to our panel of judges.

title: Win & Launch
description: Win a share of the prize pool, secure internships with our industry partners, and get the seed support you need to turn your prototype into a real startup.
